metadata.description: Criar config/dnsmasq.conf com DHCP completo na rede 192.168.200.0/24, TFTP server, detecção de arquitetura BIOS/UEFI via DHCP Option 93, anti-loop iPXE via userclass, e chainload para HTTP.
metadata.goal: Configuração dnsmasq com DHCP+TFTP+iPXE chainloading para BIOS e UEFI

summary: Created config/dnsmasq.conf with DHCP+TFTP+iPXE chainloading for BIOS/UEFI. Includes interface=enp3s0 bind-dynamic, DHCP range 192.168.200.150-250/12h, gateway/DNS options, architecture detection via Option 93 (BIOS arch0, UEFI arch7/9), iPXE anti-loop userclass, boot file selection (BIOS→undionly.kpxe, UEFI→ipxe.efi, iPXE→HTTP), and TFTP config. All 16 tests pass including dnsmasq --test syntax validation.
